vibe: Premium, minimalist, modern luxury (Aesop/Apple fusion). Calm, elegant, grounded, human warmth meets clinical trust.

hierarchy.overline: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-sans font-semibold text-[#C6A87C]

buttons.primary: bg-[#2A2522] text-[#FAF7F2] rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#C27B66] transition-colors duration-300 font-sans font-medium
buttons.secondary: border border-[#2A2522] text-[#2A2522] rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#2A2522] hover:text-[#FAF7F2] transition-colors duration-300 font-sans font-medium

components.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-3xl p-8 border border-[#EFE9E0] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
components.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8

animations.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. Provides luxurious 'momentum' feel.
animations.reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for text blocks, cards, and images. Initial { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate { opacity: 1, y: 0 }.
animations.parallax: Subtle framer-motion parallax on hero image and gallery items on scroll.

sections_instructions.header: Sticky fixed header using crystal glassmorphism ('backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF7F2]/70'). Includes Logo 'ArtJoga' (Serif), Navigation, Language Switcher (RU/EN), and CTA. z-50 index.
sections_instructions.hero: Asymmetrical layout with an editorial feel. Large high-quality image of teacher. Large H1 text 'Kundalini Yoga for Body, Mind & Soul'. Slogan 'Find Harmony. Feel Love. Live Consciously.' Two buttons: Записаться / Узнать больше. Add bottom spacing/padding.
sections_instructions.about: Section dedicated to Aleksandra Vasileuskaya. Blend of serif headlines and minimal sans-serif body. Image should have rounded corners ('rounded-[2rem]').
sections_instructions.why_us: A sophisticated bento grid for the 8 'Почему выбирают ArtJoga' cards. Use subtle off-white backgrounds, large padding, and very faint borders. Add terracotta or gold accents gently on hover.
sections_instructions.benefits: Checklist of 8 items. Use custom Lucide icons (check-circle in accent_gold color). Clean, readable list layout with generous line heights.
sections_instructions.gallery: Framer-motion powered smooth horizontal scroll or masonry grid. Provide images generous breathing room. Images must have rounded corners.
sections_instructions.testimonials: Editorial quote style. Large serif quote marks. Clean layout emphasizing client voices.
sections_instructions.faq: Shadcn accordion component, heavily customized. Remove default 'vercel' look. Use 1px delicate borders ('border-[#EFE9E0]'). Maintain 5 items.
sections_instructions.contact: Booking form (Name, Phone, Email, Message). Customize Shadcn inputs to be organic (rounded borders, bg-[#FFFFFF], focus ring in terracotta or gold).
sections_instructions.footer: Massive padding ('py-24' or 'py-32'). Elegant typography. Includes social links (Instagram, Telegram, Email, Phone).

testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.
